reachability_artifacts: sworn board --release 2026-06-28-yearSnapshot-schema-cleanup (run in ~/projects/fired, S05 binary /tmp/sworn-s05) still reads the real coach object-form board — reader tolerance preserved while emit/validate are now canonical object-only

effort_complexity.rationale: Confirmed by implementer: 3 edits on S04's base (canonical marshal, object-only schema, object-only validator) + 1 test update. Reader unchanged; full suite green.

violations: Step 0 / Gate 2 — S05-board-canonical-emit is not assigned to any track in the canonical board.json on release-wt/2026-06-30-sworn-operational-readiness. Both `sworn board --release 2026-06-30-sworn-operational-readiness --json` and `git show release-wt/2026-06-30-sworn-operational-readiness:.../board.json` list T4's slices as only ["S04-board-record-reconciliation"]. S05's membership exists ONLY on the track branch, where it was injected inside the implementer's feat commit 565f909 (board.json: S04 -> [S04, S05]), never planned in via /replan-release and never propagated to release-wt. The release-wt..track drift is 0, so the forward-merge drift gate cannot heal this. Proposed amendment: planner runs /replan-release to canonically register S05-board-canonical-emit under T4-board-record-reconciliation in release-wt's board.json, then forward-syncs the corrected board into the T4 track branch.

Lifecycle — S05 has no `docs(...): start implementation` commit. status.json start_commit is 3847df0, which is S04's feat commit ("oracle reads canonical coach board.json — S04"). Consequently start_commit..HEAD spans S04's verifier verdict (0d22f65), two merges (41efcf8, ae25c0f), an S01 replan (51e4dab) and the S05 feat commit (565f909) — it does NOT isolate S05's scope, so the verifier's mandated `git diff <start_commit>` cannot bound the slice. Proposed amendment: planner establishes a proper planned -> in_progress start commit for S05 and sets start_commit to it.

Process ordering — S05's spec.json, board membership, intake.md edit, production implementation (internal/board/board.go, internal/baton/schemas/board-v1.json, internal/baton/validator.go) and proof.md were all created in a single feat commit (565f909). No planner /replan-release commit and no planned->in_progress transition preceded implementation; the planner/implementer/verifier ordering was collapsed. An implementer cannot self-clear this — registration and lifecycle are planner authority.
